text: There shall not be an average difference greater than1/8inch between the outside diameters of each single tire composing a dual solid rubber tire.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 4. Tires [27450 - 27503]
##### § 27453

There shall not be an average difference greater than1/8inch between the outside diameters of each single tire composing a dual solid rubber tire.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: There shall not be an average difference greater than1/8inch between the outside diameters of each single tire composing a dual solid rubber tire.
